name: CEL_PROGRAM_CARDS_VL
query: SELECT B.CARD_ID, B.PROGRAM_ID, B.ILLUSTRATION_ID, B.VALUE_ID, B.POINTS, T.CARD_HEADLINE, T.CARD_MESSAGE, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM CEL_PROGRAM_CARDS_B B, CEL_PROGRAM_CARDS_TL T WHERE B.CARD_ID = T.CARD_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
